items.title: Germany’s AllUnity expands EURAU to Solana as euro stablecoins gain traction
items.whyYouShouldCare: The expansion of EURAU to Solana enhances liquidity options, positioning SOL as a competitive platform for euro stablecoin transactions.

items.title: Meta’s USDC pilot shows how stablecoins could capture billions in creator payouts
items.whyYouShouldCare: Meta’s USDC pilot highlights the potential for stablecoins to streamline creator payouts, which could drive increased usage of Solana's infrastructure.

items.title: Solana ecosystem expands institutional push with Europe-focused research arm
items.whyYouShouldCare: The establishment of a Europe-focused research arm signals institutional confidence in Solana, potentially attracting more projects and investment to the ecosystem.
